channel.title: Wisdom on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Wisdom on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Wayside
item.description:
M13 Listen! A sower went out to sow.
And as he sowed, some seeds fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured them.

🌞

Assume a box for the cultivated plot.
Any sowing done in its padding (near the perimeter), will have some of the seed flung, falling on the wayside.

The wayside was “field” from the beginning.
However, after many footfalls cut through the fields, that portion of arable land, was reduced to a wayside. Fallow ground + Compaction. Doubly hard.

item.title: Building the City
item.description:
I want to take the time to write a full blueprint later.
But now, I leave you with these precepts:

The Foundation:

  • Believe in Jesus Christ as your Salvation
  • Learn how to be led by the Holy Spirit
  • Read through the canon, Holy Bible, multiple times
  • Converse with the Father as His child

The Principal Virtues:

  • Love
  • Faith
  • Wisdom

The Pillars of Growth:

  • Food & Drink (“Bread & Water/ Milk/ Wine, " which is the word of God)
  • Exercise (Prayer, Obedience, Walking by Faith)
  • Rest (confidence in GOD)

The Definition of Kingdom-Life

“Trust and Obey”
